settings.label: Logo (light / dark bg)
settings.info: Used on hero and dark areas. Recommended: white wordmark PNG, 400px wide.

settings.label: Logo symbol / icon
settings.info: Used in footer. Recommended: white symbol PNG, 100px.

settings.label: Social share image
settings.info: Used for Open Graph and Twitter Card. Recommended: 1200×630px.

settings.label: WhatsApp number
settings.info: Include country code, no spaces. Example: 919876543210

settings.content: This theme uses Tenor Sans (display) and Josefin Sans (body), loaded from Google Fonts. These are set in the theme code and cannot be changed here.
Colors are defined in CSS custom properties in base.css. The Light Parchment Luxury palette is: cream background #F7EFE2, espresso ink #1F1812, amber gold #8A642D, dark footer #5B3D21.
